action_set_definitions.name: get_ticket_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full details of a specific ticket, including its current priority, category, and status.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier for the ticket (e.g., 'TKT-777').

action_set_definitions.name: get_customer_behavioral_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches the detailed behavioral requirements and churn risk for a customer based on their ANI (phone number).

ani.description: The Automatic Number Identification (phone number) of the customer.

action_set_definitions.name: check_sync_status
action_set_definitions.description: Verifies if the CRM and PBR Matching Engine are synchronized for a specific account. This is a prerequisite for routing.

account_id.description: The unique identifier for the customer account.

action_set_definitions.name: list_agents_with_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all available agents including their expertise tiers, current ticket load, max capacity, and current stress levels (Burnout Loop metrics).

action_set_definitions.name: assign_ticket
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the final routing of a ticket to a specific agent. Only succeeds if system is synchronized and safety limits are met.

ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to be assigned.

agent_id.description: The ID of the agent to receive the ticket.

state_description.tickets: A list of active customer service tickets, each containing ID, priority, category, and current status.
state_description.agents: A registry of available support agents, including their expertise tiers, current ticket load, and maximum capacity.
state_description.routing_history: A log of all state transitions and previous assignments made within the environment.
state_description.system_metrics: Global counters such as average response time and total tickets resolved.
